Removed_Other.purpose: Ensures smoother video recording by avoiding problematic hardware.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string that represents the current version of the codebase.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes and ensure they are using the latest version of the game code.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Flips the timestamp in dynamic strings for better formatting.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances the readability of time-related information in the game.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how string data is handled in the game.
Changed_Other.purpose: Players experience faster loading times and smoother gameplay.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes how timestamps are stored and retrieved in strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance when dealing with time-related data in games.

Added_Other.name: DFIntCaptureVideoBitsPerThousandPixels_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the video quality settings for capturing gameplay footage based on pixel density.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances the clarity and quality of recorded videos for players sharing their gameplay.

Added_Other.name: FFlagAXSendPurchaseAttempt_Staged
Added_Other.mechanism: Modifies the process of sending purchase requests in a staged manner.
Added_Other.purpose: Enhances the reliability of in-game purchases, making transactions smoother for players.

Added_Other.name: FFlagVideoCaptureIxpEnabled_IXP
Added_Other.mechanism: Enables advanced video capture features for recording gameplay.
Added_Other.purpose: Players can create higher quality videos of their gameplay experiences.
